rationale: Domestic nonprofit corporation name at top of form. Same key as sister NP_MNPCA-11 / NP_MNPCA-11A.

Name of the corporation's President in the FIRST roster table (top row, y≈410-427, LEFT name column). Role-keyed officer roster matches sister NP_MNPCA-11. Note: this form's roster has Name in LEFT column and Address in RIGHT column (opposite to MNPCA-11A).
Address of the President (row 1, y≈410-427, RIGHT address column). Single-line widget combining street/city/state/zip.
Name of the Treasurer (row 2, y≈386-405).

Name of the first listed director (row 5, y≈314-330). Indexed director_N.* pattern for 3 inline director rows.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ('X' one box only) Exhibit A attached hereto is a copy of the resolution adopted by: The members of the corporation entitled to vote.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive checkbox 1 of 2 in SECOND. Enum value 'members'. Mirrors dissolution.consent_class on sister NP_MNPCA-11/NP_MNPCA-11A but in the revocation namespace because this filing reverses an earlier dissolution authorization rather than initiating one.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The directors of the corporation, there being no members or no members entitled to vote.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive checkbox 2 of 2 in SECOND. Enum value 'directors_when_no_voting_members'.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ___ (inline trailing blank, y≈160-177, right side)
rationale: Inline trailing blank ending the THIRD paragraph. Same multi-line registered_office.address_line{1,2} pattern as sister NP_MNPCA-11.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ___ (street, city, state and zip code) (wide line, y≈135-152)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the THIRD paragraph for the registered office address (street, city, state and zip code).
Date the statement is signed (top-left of page 1, narrow widget).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signer (top-right, y≈700-716)
rationale: First authorized officer's printed name and capacity. Shape D (combined name+capacity), per filing.signer_N.printed_name_and_capacity primitive established on sister NP_MNPCA-11.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signer (right, y≈634-650)
rationale: Second authorized officer's printed name and capacity. 13-B MRSA §104.1.B requires only one authorized officer to sign, so the second slot is optional.
